featuredItems.title: New to the EA Forums? Start here!

featuredItems.title: Getting Started — Welcome to the Forums!
featuredItems.author: EA_David

postItems.title: Game crash when Storm Point is on queue
postItems.content: Storm Point crash is back... Yup just that. Some people with AMD graphics cards (and sometimes Intel) may encounter this problem when starting the game. This bug started last season and the devs solution at the moment was to remove the map temporarily. In my personal experience I couldn't fix it, but some people could by following the steps below.

postItems.title: Ranked requeue claims there is too large a rank mismatch, when there is not.
postItems.content: As you can see in the screenshot, the game seems to think mine and my friends' ranks are too mismatched when requeuing. I am plat 4, they are both gold 3. It lets us queue from the lobby, but does this whenever we die and try to requeue.

postItems.title: Sim stuck at veterinarian
postItems.content: I can't choose any tag that matches what problem I'm having. My sim is at vets with cats. One cat is getting examined and never finishes. I can't direct my sim to do anything. I can't get them to travel home; go to worlds is greyed out. So is travel for the sim. Anybody have any suggestions to fix this? Thank you for any and all help.

postItems.title: EA App update 7.4 — download speeds massively improved
postItems.content: Hey everyone! EA just pushed update 7.4 to the EA App and I wanted to start a thread so we can all compare notes. On my end the download speeds have noticeably improved — games that used to take 40 minutes are finishing in about 25. Has anyone else noticed the new Quick Resume feature in the library?

postItems.title: BF2042 Season 8 — full patch notes breakdown and analysis
postItems.content: Season 8 is here and there's a lot to unpack. The balance changes to the SMG class are significant. The MAC-5 nerf was expected but the PPSH buff is a surprise. Let's break down each change and what it means for ranked play.

postItems.title: FC 25 FUT Champions points not credited after wins
postItems.content: Major bug in FC 25 Ultimate Team — FUT Champions qualifying points are NOT being awarded after wins in Weekend League. I won 4 games in a row this morning and my point total hasn't moved at all. This is a competitive ranked mode, EA really needs to address this fast.

postItems.title: EA App library showing games as Not Installed after update 7.4
postItems.content: After installing EA App update 7.4, my entire games library (about 14 games) is showing as Not Installed even though all the game files are still on my drive. I've tried repairing the app, clearing the cache, restarting the service, and re-scanning the install folder. Nothing has worked.

postItems.title: PSA: How to check if your EA Account has been compromised
postItems.content: With credential stuffing attacks on the rise, here's how to tell if your EA Account has been accessed without your knowledge and what to do about it. Check your login history: EA Account Settings → Security → Recent Activity. Every login with IP and location is listed there.

postItems.title: Apex Legends beginner guide — tips from a Diamond player
postItems.content: I've been playing Apex since Season 1 and hit Diamond four seasons running. Movement is everything. Bunny hopping, slide cancels, and wall bounces aren't just tricks — they're survival mechanics. Spend 20 minutes in the firing range learning slide cancels before your next ranked match.

postItems.title: How do I save manually in Dragon Age: The Veilguard?
postItems.content: I'm about 8 hours into Dragon Age: The Veilguard and I keep accidentally progressing past points I want to go back to. The game seems to autosave but I can't work out how to create a named manual save. Is this a feature in the game or not?

postItems.title: [BF2042] Season 8 crash on Kaleidoscope — reproducible steps inside
postItems.content: Found a reproducible crash in Battlefield 2042 Season 8 on the Kaleidoscope map. Load into a Conquest 128-player lobby, ride any vehicle into the underground tunnel on the east side of Sector B, throw a grenade while exiting the vehicle at speed. Game freezes every time.

postItems.title: [Official] Known Issues — May 2026 Update
postItems.content: Hello EA Community! Here is the current list of known issues we are tracking for May 2026. We will update this post as fixes are deployed. Issues currently under investigation: Battlefield 2042 Kaleidoscope crash (hotfix ETA 48hrs), FC 25 FUT Champs points crediting (resolved), EA App library scan (resolved).

postItems.title: Jedi Survivor crashing after latest patch
postItems.content: Since the latest update the game crashes whenever I fast travel to Koboh. Verified files and updated drivers but no luck.

postItems.title: Best skill tree upgrades for Grand Master difficulty?
postItems.content: Starting my second playthrough on Grand Master. What skills should be prioritised first for survivability?

postItems.title: Can't unlock New Journey+
postItems.content: Finished the story but New Journey+ isn't appearing on the main menu. Anyone else having this issue?

postItems.title: Fallen Order stuttering on PC after Windows update
postItems.content: The game was running perfectly until a recent Windows update. Now I get severe frame pacing issues.

postItems.title: Still finding full Battlefront 2015 lobbies?
postItems.content: Surprisingly I've been getting Walker Assault matches consistently. Curious what regions are still active.

postItems.title: Hero Assault matchmaking takes forever
postItems.content: Queue times for Hero modes have become extremely long over the last week.

postItems.title: Battlefront II Celebration Edition content missing
postItems.content: Logged in today and almost all my cosmetic unlocks have disappeared.

postItems.title: Supremacy mode still the best multiplayer experience
postItems.content: After all these years I still think Supremacy is the peak Star Wars multiplayer mode.
